channel.title: Sabredav on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Sabredav on Pi Stack

item.title: Baikal vs SabreDAV vs Nextcloud Contacts — Self-Hosted CardDAV Contact Management
item.description: Managing contacts across devices without handing them to Google or Apple is a growing concern for privacy-conscious users. CardDAV, an open protocol for syncing address books, gives you full control over your contact data. In this guide, we compare three self-hosted CardDAV solutions — Baikal, SabreDAV, and Nextcloud Contacts — so you can pick the right one for your infrastructure.
